reference: I am forty-nine years old, about five feet six inches tall, and weigh approximately seventy-four kilograms. I have just started experiencing some pain in my knees when I ride my bike, but yesterday I began working out at the gym. Everything was going fine until I tried the exercise where my elbows are pointed out from my body and I pull the weights down. There was pain in my right elbow as I attempted to do it. It seems to become less painful the more I did it, but the next morning it was hurting with all movement.
text: I am 49 years old, about 5 feet 6 inches tall, and weigh approximately 74 kilograms. I have just started experiencing some pain in my knees when I ride my bike, but yesterday I began working out at the gym. Everything was going fine until I tried the exercise where my elbows are pointed out from my body and I pull the weights down. There was pain in my right elbow as I attempted to do it. It seemed to become less painful the more I did it, but the next morning it was hurting with all movement.
